result.status_detail: Cycle 94 R-12 you.com BENIGN capture COMPLETE. Real response 'The capital of South Korea is Seoul. ...' rendered with 3 source citations (wikipedia, britannica, britannica). Endpoint and SSE schema fully captured.
result.uuid_format: chatId and conversationTurnId are UUID v4 (e.g. 2dbbffc1-4dbb-41e1-8b83-718783fd7705 / f0eedef1-9d73-492f-831b-7cfa747ffd2f)
response_event_types_observed: youChatToken events: {"youChatToken": " word"} — text streamed token-by-token (e.g. " in", " the", " north", " western", " part", " of", " South", " Korea", " along", " the", " Han", " River", " [[1]](url)", " [[2]](url)", " [[3]](url)")
Done sentinel: "I'm Mr. Meeseeks. Look at me." (legacy easter-egg DONE marker)

envelope_design_recommendation_for_warni.format: SSE with newline-delimited JSON-per-line (NOT single-line). Need Content-Type: text/event-stream OR text/plain with manual streaming.
envelope_design_recommendation_for_warni.minimal_strategy: Send ~3 events: (1) {"youChatToken": " 보안"} (2) {"youChatToken": " 경고"} (3) terminator. Or single chunk: {"youChatToken": " 보안 경고: 민감정보 차단됨"}
envelope_design_recommendation_for_warni.completion_signal: Send 'I'm Mr. Meeseeks. Look at me.' as last line OR HTTP stream close
envelope_design_recommendation_for_warni.url_routing: Client uses URL ?q= and ?cid= to identify thread; envelope output should populate same chatId in any UUID-bearing fields
envelope_design_recommendation_for_warni.rendered_html_selector: Markdown div containing inline citations like [[1]](url) — to be inspected separately if needed

result.previous_classification: you_json template (443B) APF block 정상 동작 but generic error, NOT 보안 경고
result.diff_from_previous_understanding: Architecture clarified: GET-based single-stream SSE with token-by-token chunks (youChatToken). Token field name is unique to you.com. NOT NDJSON, NOT JSON-array. Easter-egg done sentinel is required.

notes: Cycle 94 R-12 you.com schema CAPTURED. Key field: youChatToken (single field per event, contains text fragment with markdown). Done sentinel: 'I'm Mr. Meeseeks. Look at me.' literal. Recommend you_json template rewrite to emit SSE events with this exact schema instead of generic error JSON.
